expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the focus and ties it to another feature: “Holdout regression focus (blocking): Promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature… running against a different feature… BCIN-976”. It then enumerates Phase 7 stability assertions (approval gating, archive-then-promote, outputs) and confirms fixture evidence introduces no exceptions.

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: result.md declares “Primary phase: Holdout” and frames the work as a “holdout regression checkpoint (not a full plan generation)” with “Evidence-based contract assertions”. execution_notes.md also states this is “contract/evidence-based rather than an executed runtime verification” and “without generating a full QA plan,” aligning with holdout expectations.
